creator: novel@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yeah, there's a bug. The bhyve driver expects network model to be specified, otherwise it crashes like in this case.

I've sent a fix: https://www.redhat.com/archives/libvir-list/2018-March/msg00515.html

I'll backport it to the port once it's reviewed and merged.

By the way, interface type 'network' is not support by the bhyve driver, 'bridge' should be used instead. For example:

      <interface type='bridge'>
        <model type='virtio'/>
        <source bridge="bridge1"/>
      </interface>
